title: Elegant Mediterranean Baby New Potatoes Bake
description: A flavorful and refreshing solo dinner dish that combines the natural sweetness of baby new potatoes with the zesty tang of feta cheese and the crunch of fresh parsley.
instructions: Arrange the baby new potatoes in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the extra virgin olive oil over the potatoes and sprinkle with salt to taste.
Toss the potatoes to coat evenly with the oil and seasonings.
Transfer the potatoes to a 9x13-inch baking dish and top with half of the crumbled feta cheese.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fresh lemon juice, minced garlic, and chopped fresh dill.
Pour the lemon-dill mixture over the potatoes and sprinkle with the remaining feta cheese.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
